---
title: "sanitize_thesaurus.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\data\sanitize_thesaurus.py"
loc: 55
complexity: 9
logic_score: 4.85
style_score: 3.34
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 4.14
---

## Intent
The `sanitize_thesaurus.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on sanitize_clusters, ThesaurusSanitizer, sanitize_clusters, execute, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via sanitize_clusters, ThesaurusSanitizer, sanitize_clusters, execute, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `sanitize_clusters`
- `ThesaurusSanitizer`
- `sanitize_clusters`
- `execute`
- `main`
